candidate_definitions.text: Core Lightning fork with bLIP-56 — pluggable channel factory support for SuperScalar
Core Lightning (previously c-lightning) is a lightweight, highly customizable and [standard compliant][std] implementation of the Lightning Network protocol.
SuperScalar channel factory plugin for Core Lightning (bLIP-56)

SuperScalar channel factory plugin for [Core Lightning](https://github.com/ElementsProject/lightning). Implements [bLIP-56](https://github.com/lightning/blips/pull/56) (pluggable channel factories) using Decker-Wattenhofer state trees with MuSig2 signing.
